spec_match.rationale: The monitor uses exact LoAF and PerformanceScriptTiming field names and no longer links to the wrong ChromeStatus feature.

interactive.rationale: Style and layout intensity sliders plus style, layout, combined, and clear controls update metrics and the result log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page and feature index now describe repeated rAF pressure runs with explicit fallback accounting.

edge_cases.rationale: The fallback run count increments when origin-trial split fields are absent, preventing unsupported fields from being misread as zero-cost style/layout work.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5171478175809536.

design_system.rationale: The repaired page uses CSS variables and removes source inline style attributes and event handlers.

summary: Open critique items repaired. DevTools MCP verification exercised both intensity sliders plus trigger style work, trigger layout work, trigger both, and clear log controls at http://localhost:3000/v147/long-animation-frames-style-duration/raf-budget-monitor/?verify=after-loaf-style-fix. Chrome 148 updated runs, max duration, and fallback run metrics for all three paths, with split fields correctly shown as unavailable. Console and network were clean; conformance now reports 4 baseline PASS and 4 origin-trial FAIL in this browser.
